campaign.title: Featured Listing Upgrade
campaign.subject: Your listing could be getting 5x more views
campaign.description: Compare current views to featured average, offer upgrade

landing_page.ai_goal: Upgrade user to a featured listing for maximum visibility

slides.title: Your Visibility Gap
slides.narration: Let's look at the numbers for your business. Your current monthly views: 120. Featured listings in your category average 2,400 views. That's a 20x difference. Here's how to close that gap.

slides.title: What Featured Gets You

benefits.detail: Top of search results and category
Weighted higher in modern tools recommendations

slides.narration: What does Featured get you? Priority placement—top of search results and your category. A Featured badge—an instant trust signal. News eligibility—you're considered for feature stories. Enhanced analytics—see who's viewing and why. Social amplification—promoted to our entire audience. And modern tools priority—weighted higher when modern tools makes recommendations.

slides.title: Featured Results
slides.narration: The results speak for themselves. Featured businesses see an average four hundred eighty-seven percent increase in views—three to eight times typical. Inquiries increase by three hundred twelve percent on average. modern tools recommendations increase by five times. And the ROI? Twelve to one on average. For every dollar spent on Featured, businesses see twelve back.

slides.title: Your Featured Preview
slides.narration: Here's how your business would appear as a Featured listing. Your name with the Featured badge. Top position in local services results. Enhanced profile with all the bells and whistles. Priority in modern tools recommendations. This preview is ready to activate whenever you say go.

slides.title: Simple Pricing

content.headline: Featured Pricing
content.includes: All Featured benefits included in both plans

slides.narration: Pricing is simple. Monthly: $99 dollars per month, cancel anytime. Or go annual at $999 per month and save $189 percent. Both plans include all Featured benefits. And there's a thirty-day satisfaction guarantee—if you don't see results, we'll make it right.

slides.title: Featured Success Story

content.quote: Featured paid for itself in the first week. I was skeptical, but the numbers don't lie—I'm getting calls I never got before.
content.author: Local Business Owner

slides.narration: Don't just take our word for it. Local Business Owner from a local business said: 'Featured paid for itself in the first week. I was skeptical, but the numbers don't lie—I'm getting calls I never got before.' They saw significant increase in visibility after upgrading.

slides.title: Upgrade to Featured

content.headline: Ready for 20x More Visibility?
content.urgency: Featured spots in local services are limited

slides.narration: Ready for 20x more visibility? Click 'Upgrade to Featured' to activate now. Or compare all plans if you want to see other options. Featured spots in local services are limited—don't let competitors take yours. Remember: thirty-day satisfaction guarantee. No risk, all upside.
